proposal_metadata.methodology: City-level search with stricter contact extraction

candidates.notes: Full-service sign company since 2003. Electric signs, car wraps, digital prints, laser engraving. 20+ years experience. Serves Utah County and Salt Lake City areas.

formerly Timpanogos Custom Signs. Two locations: Provo and Salt Lake City. Full-service: design, production, permitting, installation, repair. Serving Utah County, Draper, Bluffdale, Herriman, Sandy.

Personalized products: desk name plates, door signs, keychains, luggage tags. Specializes in LDS community products (missionary plaques, luggage tags).
Custom laser cutting, laser fabrication, laser etching. FFL licensed.

candidates.mainBrand: Epilog Laser, KERN, TYKMA Electrox, BOFA, Purex
candidates.notes: Exclusive Epilog Laser distributor for Arizona, Utah, Colorado, Wyoming, Nevada, Montana, Idaho. Also distributes KERN large-format cutters, TYKMA galvo machines, BOFA and Purex laser exhaust systems. In business since 1988.
